title: pythonをintel mac版からsilicon mac版へアップデートしたい。既にインストールしたが入れ替えて古いバージョンを削除せよ
summary_text: Concrete hits: - `None` in scanned root/system surfaces for `/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/awscli-arm64`: - `/Library/LaunchDaemons`, `/Library/LaunchAgents`, `/System/Library/LaunchDaemons`, `/System/Library/LaunchAgents` - `/etc/crontab`, `/private/etc/crontab`, `/usr/lib/cron/tabs`, `/etc/periodic`, `/private/etc/periodic` - `/usr/local/bin`, `/usr/local/sbin`, `/usr/local/etc`, `/usr/local/libexec`, `/usr/local/aws-cli`, `/usr/local/Cellar` - live process table (`ps aux`) shows no active process using that path Blocking assessment: - No blocking hit detected; deletion does not appear blocked by root/system references. Audit gap: - `crontab -u root -l` is not permitted in this lane (`operation not permitted: crontab`), so root crontab contents were not directly inspectable.
